trustpilot.notes: Mixed reviews - some customers for 6+ years, but concerns about Netflix detection and refund policies

scamalytics.status: Not applicable - this is a proxy/DNS service, not a target for fraud checks
scamalytics.note: Smart DNS Proxy redirects geolocation data, not an anonymization service

key_discussions: Streaming service - works with many platforms but not Netflix
Long-term customers but frustration with changes
Prepaid long-term contracts with limited refund

general_reputation.note: Designed for streaming unblocking, not privacy/security

caveats: Not a true proxy for anonymity; designed for streaming. Limited refund policy on long-term contracts
